name: Grilled Beef and Romaine Salad Thai-Style
recipeIngredient: 8 thin slices top sirloin (or top round, sirloin, or club steak)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the grill and cook the meat before preparing the ingredients.
2. Thinly slice cucumbers and radishes.
3. Cut scallions into 1-inch lengths.
4. Combine all greens in a salad bowl.
5. Brush meat with oil, then sprinkle with salt and pepper.
6. Grill meat on both sides for about 2 minutes per side or longer, depending on desired doneness.
7. While the meat is still hot, cut slices into 1/2 inch strips and add them to the greens.
8. If there are any accumulated juices, add them to the sauce.
9. Pour the sauce over all and toss.
10. Serve immediately with hot rice or bread.
